name: Fresh Fruit Frappe
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cut-up cantaloupe or honeydew melon
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except ice in a blender.
2. Fill the blender half full with the mixture; add crushed ice to fill the blender to the top.
3. Cover and blend on high speed until the mixture is smooth and uniform.
4. Repeat blending the remaining mixture.
5. Serve immediately. Garnish with fruit if desired.
6. This recipe serves 4.
